_meta.note: Auto-generated daily at 7:30 AM UTC. Manual edits persist until the next run.

game_overlays.matchupNote: Atlanta United hits the road desperate to climb into the playoff picture, but they face a buzzsaw in a Columbus side hunting down the Supporters' Shield. With the postseason race tightening, every point is a lifeline for the Five Stripes against the league’s most clinical juggernaut.

With both clubs fighting to solidify their postseason positioning, Philadelphia travels to South Florida desperate to disrupt Inter Miami’s march toward a record-breaking Supporters' Shield. Every point is critical as the Union scrap to climb above the playoff line while the Herons look to tighten their grip on the top seed.

Seattle heads to BMO Stadium looking to solidify their postseason standing against an LAFC side desperate to keep pace in the Supporters’ Shield race. With the playoff line tightening in the West, every point tonight is a high-stakes pivot for both clubs.
